parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const input = $('Normalize Dynamic IP Input').first().json; const sticky = input.proxy_session_mode === 'STICKY'; const policy = { mode: sticky ? 'PROXY_SESSION_MODE_STICKY' : 'PROXY_SESSION_MODE_ROTATING', region: 'US', rotation_mode: sticky ? 'PROXY_ROTATION_MODE_STICKY_SESSION' : 'PROXY_ROTATION_MODE_PER_REQUEST', labels: { country_code: 'US', proxy_session_mode: input.proxy_session_mode, selection_seed: input.selection_seed, job_id: input.job_id } }; if (sticky) policy.sticky_ttl = input.sticky_ttl || '600s'; return { account_id: input.account_id, purpose: input.purpose, force_new: true, policy, selection_policy: { country_code: 'US', purpose: input.purpose, max_attempts: 10 } }; })() }}
